column3: "Saw Palmetto reduces inflammation" refers to its ability to lessen swelling and pain caused by bodily irritations or injuries.
"Saw Palmetto supports immune system" refers to its ability to promote good health by enhancing body's defense mechanism.

"Saw Palmetto boosts antioxidant levels" refers to its ability to increase the amount of antioxidants in a person's body, potentially leading to health benefits such as enhanced protection against harmful substances known as free radicals.

"Saw Palmetto lowers cholesterol levels" refers to its natural tendency to reduce the amount of cholesterol present in the bloodstream, which can help maintain a healthy heart and support better cardiovascular function.

"Saw Palmetto reduces blood pressure" refers to its ability to lessen strain on the blood vessels, which consequently can improve
          the circulation and heart function of an individual.
"Saw Palmetto improves digestion" refers to its ability to enhance the process of breaking down food within the stomach, increasing nutrient absorption, and promoting overall gastrointestinal health.
"Saw Palmetto promotes healthy skin" refers to its ability to nourish the body's cells which improve their performance resulting in better skin quality.

"Saw Palmetto detoxifies body" refers to its ability to naturally remove toxins from our system by supporting liver function, helping 
         eliminate waste and promoting overall health.
"Saw Palmetto enhances brain function" refers to its ability to improve cognitive performance and mental clarity through supporting neuronal health.

"Saw Palmetto promotes weight loss" refers to its ability to boost metabolism which leads to easier burning of fat and calories, thereby 
         helping people lose weight.
